revision.comment: 「[[Template:Trim]]」を保護しました: [[WP:HRT|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]]: 使用数161,000以上 ([編集=管理者のみ許可] (無期限) [移動=管理者のみ許可] (無期限))
1 revision imported: importing again with the templates
Text replacement - "[[Category:List of Shikinaisha]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:List of Shikinaisha]]</noinclude>"

Adding [[Category:qq]]<noinclude>[[Category:Attempt at corrected List of Shikinaisha]][[Category:jawiki link]][[ja:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]</noinclude>[[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{safesubst:#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:List of Shikinaisha]]</noinclude>[[ja:Trim]]<noinclude>[[Category:List of Shikinaisha]] [[Category:qq]]<noinclude>[[Category:Attempt at corrected List of Shikinaisha]][[Category:jawiki link]][[ja:Template:Trim]]</noinclude>[[Category:qq]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: I am shocked at how hard this import was but doing it again. Programmatically changed the xml to reimport and fix the problems I introduced

revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<nowiki>{{str_trim|</nowiki>''text''<nowiki>}}</nowiki> = ''text'' with any leading or trailing whitespace removed.
[[Category:String manipulation templates]] </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:1|{{{1|}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<nowiki>{{str_trim|</nowiki>''text''<nowiki>}}</nowiki> = ''text'' with any leading or trailing whitespace removed.
[[Category:String manipulation templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/MSGJ|MSGJ]] ([[User talk:MSGJ|talk]]) to last version by Plastikspork

revision.comment: 「[[Template:Trim]]」を保護しました: [[WP:HRT|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]]: 使用数161,000以上 ([編集=管理者のみ許可] (無期限) [移動=管理者のみ許可] (無期限))
1 revision imported: importing wikidata q template
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors

1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on
1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23043689808|manual triggered pipeline]]
